recommendations.title: Maine Pyar Kiya
recommendations.overview: After Suman's father leaves her in the care of another family while he travels abroad, she falls in love with Prem. However, in order to for them to marry, Prem has to prove to Suman's father that he is not the same as his own dad.

recommendations.title: Something from Tiffany's
recommendations.overview: One woman's life is forever changed by an engagement ring meant for someone else.

recommendations.title: Bad Influence
recommendations.overview: An ex-con gets a fresh start when hired to protect a wealthy heiress from a stalker — but their chemistry is hard to resist as they grow closer.

recommendations.title: How to Marry a Millionaire
recommendations.overview: Three women set out to find eligible millionaires to marry, but find true love in the process.

recommendations.title: Housefull
recommendations.overview: Believing himself to be a jinx and bringing bad luck upon himself and others, a man attempts to find true love, but ends up in very complicated relationships.

recommendations.title: It's All About Karma
recommendations.overview: Giacomo befriends a con man, believing that he is the reincarnation of his dead father.

recommendations.title: 27 Dresses
recommendations.overview: Altruistic Jane finds herself facing her worst nightmare as her younger sister announces her engagement to the man Jane secretly adores.

recommendations.title: The Drama
recommendations.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

recommendations.title: Hatred

recommendations.title: The Tasting
recommendations.overview: Hortense has a big heart and no one to share it with except her cat, her embittered mom, and a group of homeless people for whom she prepares a gourmet dinner at the local church every week. While buying a nice bottle of wine, Hortense meets Jacques,
